item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 102300Z AUTO 04006KT 010V070 CAVOK 28/11 Q1012 TEMPO VRB15G30KT 3000 -TSRA FEW100CB
🟡 TAF LFOT 101700Z 1018/1118 04008KT CAVOK PROB30 TEMPO 1023/1101 VRB15G30KT 3000 -TSRA FEW100CB BECMG 1100/1102 VRB03KT PROB40 TEMPO 1105/1111 BKN100TCU PROB30 TEMPO 1106/1110 3000 -TSRA SCT100CB BECMG 1110/1112 08005KT
